report_name: Wave of Data Breaches Hits Global Firms as Multiple Threat Actors Strike

threat_actors.name: Chaos
threat_actors.description: Claimed responsibility for a data breach against U.S. telecommunications company AireSpring as part of a series of attacks on June 10, 2026.

threat_actors.name: PEAR
threat_actors.description: Allegedly compromised Norwegian IT firm Alpha IT AS and U.S. industrial contractor Bayou Electrical Services in data breach incidents reported on June 10, 2026.

threat_actors.name: WorldLeaks
threat_actors.description: A threat actor group that claimed responsibility for data breaches against a diverse set of companies including Apollo Pipes (India), GDL (Sweden), and M1xchange (India) around June 10, 2026.

threat_actors.name: MORPHEUS
threat_actors.description: Claimed responsibility for a data breach against HDFC Mutual Fund, an asset management company in India, reported on June 10, 2026.

threat_actors.name: INSOMNIA
threat_actors.description: Targeted the Mid-Cumberland Human Resource Agency in the U.S. in a data breach incident reported on June 10, 2026.

threat_actors.name: Embargo
threat_actors.description: Claimed an attack on Auburn Electrical Construction Company in the U.S. as part of a wave of data breaches on June 10, 2026.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: Mentioned as a likely initial access vector used by threat actors in data theft and extortion campaigns.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Mentioned as a likely initial access vector used by threat actors in data theft and extortion campaigns.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Mentioned as a likely initial access vector involving the use of stolen credentials in data theft and extortion campaigns.

attack_patterns.name: OS Credential Dumping
attack_patterns.description: Described as a typical technique in data breach attack chains, using tools like Mimikatz to dump credentials from memory.

attack_patterns.name: Archive Collected Data
attack_patterns.description: Described as a typical technique in data breach attack chains for consolidating and packaging sensitive data before exfiltration, using tools like 7z.exe or rar.exe.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: Described as the final step in a typical data breach attack chain, where stolen data is exfiltrated to an actor-controlled server.

attack_patterns.name: PowerShell
attack_patterns.description: Use of encoded PowerShell commands was suggested as a hunting hint for detecting malicious activity related to data breaches.

attack_patterns.name: SMB/Windows Admin Shares
attack_patterns.description: Use of 'net use' to connect to administrative shares was suggested as a hunting hint for detecting lateral movement.

attack_patterns.name: DNS
attack_patterns.description: DNS queries for domains associated with cloud storage services were suggested as a hunting hint for detecting potential data exfiltration.

tools.name: Mimikatz
tools.description: Mentioned as a tool used for credential dumping from memory to facilitate lateral movement in typical data breach scenarios.

tools.name: 7z.exe
tools.description: Mentioned as a legitimate archiving tool that can be used by attackers to stage data for exfiltration.

tools.name: rar.exe
tools.description: Mentioned as a legitimate archiving tool that can be used by attackers to stage data for exfiltration.

identities.name: AireSpring
identities.description: A U.S.-based telecommunications company allegedly breached by the 'Chaos' threat actor group.

identities.name: Alpha IT AS
identities.description: An IT company in Norway allegedly compromised by the 'PEAR' threat actor group.

identities.name: Bayou Electrical Services
identities.description: A U.S. industrial contractor allegedly compromised by the 'PEAR' threat actor group.

identities.name: Apollo Pipes
identities.description: An Indian manufacturing company targeted by the 'WorldLeaks' threat actor group.

identities.name: GDL
identities.description: A logistics company in Sweden targeted by the 'WorldLeaks' threat actor group.

identities.name: M1xchange
identities.description: An Indian fintech firm targeted by the 'WorldLeaks' threat actor group.

identities.name: HDFC Mutual Fund
identities.description: An asset management company in India breached by the 'MORPHEUS' threat actor group.

identities.name: Mid-Cumberland Human Resource Agency
identities.description: A U.S. human resource agency targeted by the 'INSOMNIA' threat actor group.

identities.name: Auburn Electrical Construction Company
identities.description: A U.S. electrical construction company attacked by the 'Embargo' threat actor group.

infrastructure.name: Attacker Controlled Server
infrastructure.description: A generic actor-controlled server mentioned as the destination for exfiltrated data in typical data breach attack chains.

indicators.name: Attacker Tool Execution (Mimikatz)
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Mimikatz Execution
id: 2b8a0e3a-7b3b-4c8d-9a6e-7f8d9e0c1b2a
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of Mimikatz, a credential dumping tool, as mentioned in the report.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-10
tags:
  - attack.t1003
level: critical
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\mimikatz.exe'
    OriginalFileName:
      - 'mimikatz.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of the Mimikatz credential dumping tool.

indicators.name: Data Staging Tool Execution (7z, rar)
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Data Staging with Archiving Tools
id: 9c8d7e6f-5a4b-4c3d-2b1a-0e9f8d7c6b5a
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of common archiving tools (7z.exe, rar.exe) on servers, which can indicate data staging for exfiltration.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-10
tags:
  - attack.t1560
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\7z.exe'
      - '\rar.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of common archiving tools which could be used for data staging.

indicators.name: Suspicious Encoded PowerShell Execution
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Encoded PowerShell Command
id: 1a2b3c4d-5e6f-4a9b-8c7d-6e5f4a3b2c1d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of encoded PowerShell commands, a common technique to hide malicious activity.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-10
tags:
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.execution
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - ' -enc '
      - ' -encodedcommand '
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of encoded PowerShell commands, a common technique for obfuscation.

indicators.name: Lateral Movement via net use
indicators.pattern:
title: Lateral Movement via Net Use to Admin Share
id: 7d6e5f4a-3b2c-4d1a-9b8c-5e4f3a2b1c0d
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of 'net use' to connect to an administrative share (C$), which can indicate lateral movement.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-10
tags:
  - attack.t1021.002
  - attack.lateral_movement
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\net.exe'
      - '\net1.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'use'
      - '\\'
      - 'c$'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of 'net use' to connect to administrative shares, a common lateral movement technique.

indicators.name: Potential Data Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential Data Exfiltration via Cloud Storage DNS Query
id: 4a3b2c1d-9b8c-4d7e-8f6a-5e4f3a2b1c0d
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries for domains associated with common cloud storage providers, which could indicate data exfiltration staging.
references:
  - https://www.breachsense.com/breaches/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-10
tags:
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.t1071.004
  - attack.exfiltration
level: low
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|endswith:
      - '.mega.nz'
      - '.pcloud.com'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects DNS queries to common cloud storage domains, which may be used for data exfiltration.

relationships.source_name: Potential Data Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
